basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar has released the official notification for 2 Project Associate I posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Gujarat. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B.C.A/B.Sc. or equivalent qualification in an appropriate discipline with a minimum of 04 years of post qualification experience, B.Tech./B.E./M.Sc. or equivalent in any discipline, Minimum 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onwards and 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th
qualification.details: Project Associate I: B.C.A/B.Sc. or equivalent qualification in an appropriate discipline with a minimum of 04 years of post qualification experience OR B.Tech./B.E./M.Sc. or equivalent in any discipline. Candidates should have a minimum 60% or equivalent grade in percentage/grade points from Graduation onwards and 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
